scope: detail/page row-shell followup network probe for F/upload_src frontend semantics

matching_responses.note: Rendered detail document already kept normal_ids and vip_ids as empty strings, while positive_trailer and video_ids context still survived.
FillUnionInfo still surfaced state, type, playright and cover linkage, but this round did not surface F or upload_src.
The vector-layout followup still surfaced state and positive_trailer constants, but not F or upload_src.
Rendered detail document already kept normal_ids and vip_ids as empty strings, while positive_trailer and video_ids context still survived.
FillUnionInfo still surfaced state, cover_list and topic_id_list context, but this round did not surface upload_src or F.
The vector-layout followup still surfaced positive_trailer and adjacent pay_status constants, but not upload_src or F.

takeaways: The tested detail followup requests still surfaced positive_trailer and state, but this round did not surface upload_src or F in the captured document/xhr/script responses for the two representative pages.

The initial HTML for both representative pages exposed positive_trailer and video_ids context, but normal_ids and vip_ids were already empty strings in the rendered document payload on these redirected detail pages.
This is negative evidence for the current tested detail plus row-shell followup paths; it does not yet rule out a later lazy bundle or a non-detail list-page consumer.
